overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic industrial district. The character crosses an intersection, walks along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, and ascends a narrow ramp between concrete buildings under bright midday sun.

events.description: character begins crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk
futuristic sedan drives past from left to right in front of the character

agents.ego_description: character in blue tank top walks across the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing crossing the street ahead of the character
futuristic maroon sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large rust-colored structural beams supporting the elevated highway
tall futuristic glass tower with multiple stacked levels visible in the distance
tall chimney emitting white smoke with red and white stripes
raised concrete roadway structure with vehicles traveling overhead

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a futuristic urban intersection under a clear blue sky, then proceeds to cross the multi-lane street. Large orange structural beams dominate the center of the view while a glass skyscraper rises in the background. A futuristic sedan drives past as the character walks toward the opposite sidewalk.

events.description: moves from open intersection onto sidewalk under the elevated highway structure
passes parked vehicles along the curb while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the sidewalk passing parked cars and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near a parked truck on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story industrial building with blue graffiti mural on the lower level
dark colored utility truck parked by the curb
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open intersection to a sidewalk beneath the elevated highway. An industrial building with a distinctive blue wall stands on the left while the character passes parked vehicles. The elevated highway now looms directly overhead, casting shadows on the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with warehouse buildings and digital billboards

events.description: large industrial building with multiple digital billboards comes into full view on the right
approaching narrow ramp entrance between buildings ahead

agents.ego_description: character continues along the sidewalk approaching a ramp leading upward between buildings

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with multiple digital billboards and graffiti art
futuristic vending kiosk with illuminated display on the sidewalk
inclined concrete pathway leading up between two large structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the blue industrial building and approaches a large warehouse structure covered in digital billboards on the right. A futuristic vending machine stands on the sidewalk near the entrance to a narrow ramp that leads upward between the buildings. The environment maintains an industrial aesthetic with dry vegetation along the embankment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending ramp between high concrete walls

events.description: enters narrow ramp corridor between high concrete walls, sky becomes mostly obscured
continues ascending the steep concrete ramp toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: character walks up the inclined ramp between tall concrete walls toward a building with orange accents

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking up the ramp ahead of the character

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall with graffiti tags running along the left side of the ramp
metal chain-link fencing along the right side of the ramp
building with distinctive orange structural elements at the top of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed ramp flanked by high concrete walls covered in graffiti. The space is sheltered from direct sunlight, creating a more diffused lighting environment. The character ascends the steep concrete pathway toward a building with orange architectural accents visible at the top, while the elevated highway remains visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit urban intersection into a narrow, shadowed industrial corridor. It begins as the character crosses a multi-lane street beneath a clear blue sky, passing under massive orange structural beams with a glass skyscraper looming in the background. As the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, the open vista shifts into a more enclosed environment beneath the heavy concrete span of an elevated highway, passing a blue industrial building and parked vehicles. The scene then expands past a warehouse adorned with digital billboards and a futuristic vending machine before turning toward a steep, narrow ramp. Finally, the camera follows the character as they ascend the graffiti-covered concrete pathway, moving from the bright midday sun into the diffused light of the enclosed ramp toward orange architectural accents at the summit.
